error.signature: circuit_breaking_exception: [parent] Data too large, data for [request] would be larger than limit

verdict.summary: JVM heap usage exceeded circuit breaker limit. Query too large, too many aggregations, or heap too small.

dead_ends.why_fails: Circuit breakers prevent OOM crashes. Disabling them leads to unrecoverable OutOfMemoryError.

dead_ends.action: Set ES_JAVA_OPTS heap to all available RAM
dead_ends.why_fails: ES heap should be max 50% of RAM and not exceed 31GB (compressed oops limit).

workarounds.action: Reduce query scope: add filters, limit aggregation buckets
workarounds.how: Add date range filter; set size:0 for aggregation-only queries; limit terms agg size

workarounds.action: Increase JVM heap (up to 50% of RAM, max ~31GB)
workarounds.how: ES_JAVA_OPTS='-Xms16g -Xmx16g'  # in jvm.options or docker env

workarounds.action: Use scroll/search_after for large result sets instead of deep pagination
